programme.title: The Hurricane Heist, (2014, Action)
programme.desc: Thieves attempt a massive heist against the U.S. Treasury as a Category 5 hurricane approaches one of its Mint facilities.

programme.title: Shottas, (2002, Action)
programme.desc: Two young men from Jamaica climb to the top of the criminal world in Miami, with a constant presence of drugs, extortion, and deceit.

programme.title: Deuces Wild, (2002, Action)
programme.desc: The summer of 1958 forever changed the Brooklyn landscape. Aside from the sweltering summer heat and the loss of their beloved Dodgers, Brooklyn was in a state of unrest.

programme.title: The Usual Suspects, (1995, Thriller)
programme.desc: A gruesome scene adorns a pier in San Pedro, south of Los Angeles. Twenty-seven dead bodies. A burned-out ship smoldering in the harbor.

programme.title: The Way Of The Gun, (2001, Action)
programme.desc: A pair of bumbling criminals kidnap a woman for ransom money, but they soon realize they've made a huge mistake when they learn she is a surrogate for a ruthless mob boss.

programme.title: Bugsy, (1991, Drama)
programme.desc: A cold-blooded killer who dreamed of Hollywood stardom, a crazed patriot who plotted against Mussolini, and the brilliant visionary who carved Las Vegas out of the dry Nevada desert, Bugsy had it all. Rating: R

programme.title: Catch Me If You Can, (2002, Comedy)
programme.desc: From three-time Oscar-winning director Steven Spielberg, Catch Me If You Can follows Frank W. Abagnale, Jr. as he successfully passes himself off as a pilot, a lawyer, and a doctor - all before his 21st birthday!

programme.title: Layer Cake, (2004, Thriller)
programme.desc: Planning to retire and begin a new life, Mr. X (Daniel Craig, Lara Croft: Tomb Raider), a successful West End drug dealer, has been asked for one last favor: to negotiate the sale of one million hits of Ecstasy. Rated: R

programme.title: Set It Off, (1996, Action)
programme.desc: Jada Pinkett, Queen Latifah, Vivica A. Fox and Kimberly Elise star as four African American women living in a Los Angeles housing project who--pushed to the edge--resort to violence to escape poverty.

programme.title: Barbershop 2: Back in Business, (2004, Comedy)
programme.desc: The Barbershop is threatened by the arrival of a hip, well-financed chain barbershop that's about to open next door.

programme.title: Beauty Shop, (2005, Comedy)
programme.desc: Gina is a long way from the Barbershop - she's moved from Chicago to Atlanta and buys a rundown salon and inherits a motley group of stylists and a colorful clientele. It's a rocky road to fulfilling her dreams, but you can't keep a good woman down!

programme.title: Barbershop, (2002, Comedy)
programme.desc: Calvin, who inherited a struggling barbershop, views the shop as nothing but a burden and a waste of his time. After selling the shop to a local loan shark, Calvin slowly begins to see his father's vision and legacy.

programme.title: Barbershop 2: Back in Business, (2004, Comedy)
programme.desc: The Barbershop is threatened by the arrival of a hip, well-financed chain barbershop that's about to open next door.

programme.title: Beauty Shop, (2005, Comedy)
programme.desc: Gina is a long way from the Barbershop - she's moved from Chicago to Atlanta and buys a rundown salon and inherits a motley group of stylists and a colorful clientele. It's a rocky road to fulfilling her dreams, but you can't keep a good woman down!

programme.title: The 4:30 Movie, (2024, Comedy)
programme.desc: In Kevin Smith's most personal film to date, a teenage cinephile tries to woo the girl of his dreams while dealing with a hilarious mix of friends and enemies at his local cinema.

programme.title: Drugstore June, (2024, Comedy)
programme.desc: After the pharmacy in her small town is robbed, a girl who still lives at home with her parents takes matters into her own hands to solve the crime, while at the same time trying to get over her ex-boyfriend and become more of an adult.

programme.title: Hot Rod, (2007, Comedy)
programme.desc: A comedy about a stunt man who’s never successfully landed a jump without wiping out and his attempt to master the biggest stunt of his life.

programme.title: Sense and Sensibility, (1995, Romance)
programme.desc: Emma Thompson stars in the captivating romance based on Jane Austen's classic novel of two sisters' search for love in strict Victorian society.

programme.title: The Prince of Tides, (1991, Romance)
programme.desc: Barbra Streisand and Nick Nolte star in the stunning screen adaptation of Pat Conroy's best-selling novel, THE PRINCE OF TIDES. Nolte is Tom Wingo, a disillusioned Southern coach who must reveal his tortured childhood in order to help his suicidal sister.

programme.title: Swingers, (1996, Comedy)
programme.desc: In this laugh-out-loud indie comedy classic that launched the careers of its outstanding cast, two friends set out to rewrite modern dating from Los Angeles to Las Vegas.

programme.title: Deep Impact, (1998, Science fiction)
programme.desc: When a couple of young astronomers discover an enormous comet on course to collide with Earth, the countdown to doomsday begins, and the human race embarks on the fight for survival.

programme.title: The Truman Show, (1998, Dramedy)
programme.desc: Truman doesn’t realize that his quaint hometown is a giant studio set run by a visionary producer/director/creator (Ed Harris), that folks living and working there are Hollywood actors, that even his incessantly bubbly wife is a contract player.

programme.title: The Prince of Tides, (1991, Romance)
programme.desc: Barbra Streisand and Nick Nolte star in the stunning screen adaptation of Pat Conroy's best-selling novel, THE PRINCE OF TIDES. Nolte is Tom Wingo, a disillusioned Southern coach who must reveal his tortured childhood in order to help his suicidal sister.

programme.title: Bram Stoker's Dracula, (1992, Thriller)
programme.desc: Gary Oldman, Winona Ryder and Anthony Hopkins star in director Francis Ford Coppola's visually stunning, passionately seductive version of the classic Dracula legend. Rated: R

programme.title: Up in Smoke, (1978, Comedy)
programme.desc: Cheech and Chong make their film debut in this riotous rock'n'roll comedy, bringing with them the same madness, lifestyles and sketches that sold over 10 million records in the early 1970s.

programme.title: The Kentucky Fried Movie, (1977, Comedy)
programme.desc: Series of short, highly irreverent, and quite often tasteless skits.

programme.title: Meatballs, (1978, Comedy)
programme.desc: Bill Murray stars as Tripper who guides a fun-seeking collection of lovable campers and libidinous staff members through the unique pleasures of a hysterical coed summer experience.

programme.title: Convoy, (1978, Thriller)
programme.desc: Feuding with Sheriff Lyle Wallace (Ernest Borgnine), Martin Penwald (Kris Kristofferson) unites scores of his fellow-drivers via Citizen Band radio into a mile-long convoy which, powered by pent-up resentments, rolls along the Arizona highways.

programme.title: Up in Smoke, (1978, Comedy)
programme.desc: Cheech and Chong make their film debut in this riotous rock'n'roll comedy, bringing with them the same madness, lifestyles and sketches that sold over 10 million records in the early 1970s.

programme.title: Gator, (1976, Action)
programme.desc: The Feds want Gator McKlusky (Burt Reynolds) to go undercover to expose a local crime boss and former boyhood pal, Bama McCall. When Gator discovers Bama is involved in extortion, prostitution, and murder, the suspense builds to an explosive climax!

programme.title: White Lightning, (1973, Action)
programme.desc: In one of his most memorable roles, Burt Reynolds portrays a moonshine whiskey runner who turns state's witness to avenge the murder of a boy no one understood.

programme.title: Dillinger, (1973, Drama)
programme.desc: An account of the notorious gangster, John Dillinger, from midway through his bank-robbing career up until his final shootout outside the Biograph Theatre.

programme.title: Escape From Alcatraz, (1979, Action)
programme.desc: Superstar Clint Eastwood and director Don Siegel re-team for their fifth film in this fascinating account of the only three men ever to escape from the infamous maximum security prison at Alcatraz.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Exit: Astral
programme.desc: With the bond between Astral and Yuma broken, Trey takes aim at the rest of Yuma’s life points.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Crestfallen
programme.desc: The back-and-forth battle between Trey and Yuma reaches its climactic conclusion! Can Yuma defeat Trey without Astral’s assistance or will Trey triumph, leaving Yuma one Heart Piece short of making it to the finals?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Party Panic
programme.desc: Yuma and his friends get all decked out for the event of the year - the World Duel Carnival Finals party! But when Yuma forgets his invite, can he find a way into the festivities, or will he be forced to hit the road and head home early?!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Roller Duel!
programme.desc: It’s time for the World Duel Carnival Finals! But prepare for a world of twists and turns because the finalists will be dueling on a roller coaster! Can Yuma handle the ups and downs of the competition, or will he be sent for a loop?!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Roller Coaster Rampage!
programme.desc: To assess Yuma’s dueling skills, Vetrix hires the Triad of Terror, a trio of cunning card sharks, to triple team him! Yuma better figure out a way to roll through this threesome before his dueling goes off the rails!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Test Your Luck!
programme.desc: The World Duel Carnival takes a dark turn as the finalists descend into the Dragon’s Den – a dark and dangerous duel track that will bring defeat for many a duelist!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Welcome to the Jungle
programme.desc: The heat's on when Vetrix and Dextra duel in the jungle to decide who moves on to the World Duel Carnival semifinals!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Portal of Doom
programme.desc: Quinton takes a timeout during his duel against Kite to reveal the long-hidden mystery about Yuma’s father’s disappearance!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Cosmic Chaos
programme.desc: Quinton and Kite’s confrontation in the cosmos comes to a climactic conclusion!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Depths of Darkness
programme.desc: Shark finally faces off with his archenemy, Quattro! Will Shark get his long awaited revenge, or will he end up sleeping with the fishes?!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Swimming with Sharks
programme.desc: It’s the cataclysmic conclusion between Shark and Quattro! If Shark doesn’t make a comeback from the depths of defeat, not only is he out of the tournament, but his quest for justice will go unserved!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Rockin’ and Rollin’
programme.desc: There’s chaos in the canyon when Yuma duels Nistro to see who will get the last spot in the World Duel Carnival semifinals! Can Yuma dodge defeat in the desert, or is Nistro destined to rock Yuma's world?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Doctor Visit
programme.desc: When Yuma’s deck goes missing, he and the gang set out to look for it! But when their search leads them to Heartland City, they end up finding much more than they bargained for!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Duel of Destiny: Part 1
programme.desc: Yuma sets his sights on reeling in Shark in the first battle of the semifinals, but when his foe starts off dueling like a guppy, Yuma questions if he’s being baited! Does Yuma learn this far too late to escape a sinister Shark attack?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Duel of Destiny: Part 2
programme.desc: This is it! Yuma’s jaw-dropping duel against Shark in the World Duel Carnival semifinals draws to a finish! Can Yuma rise above his razor-sharp rival, or will he be dragged down to the depths of defeat?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: The Hart of the Matter
programme.desc: The mighty masked duelist Vetrix faces off against the Number Hunter Kite! Unfortunately for Kite, Vetrix springs a shocking surprise that makes dueling all but impossible!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Change of Hart
programme.desc: The explosive end to the battle between Kite and Vetrix roars to a finish! As the battle climaxes, Yuma sets out to free Kite’s brother Hart from Vetrix’s grasp, while Kite duels knowing full well that Hart’s safety hangs in the balance!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Sphere of Fear: Part 1
programme.desc: It all comes down to this! Yuma squares off against Vetrix in a battle that will determine the first ever World Duel Carnival Champion!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Sphere of Fear: Part 2
programme.desc: As the duel between Vetrix and Yuma races to its cataclysmic conclusion, Yuma stares down defeat and comes face-to-face with Vetrix’s shocking secret!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Sphere of Fear: Part 3
programme.desc: This is it! The earth-shattering ending of Yuma’s duel against Vetrix! Can Yuma rise above Vetrix’s unrelenting onslaught, or will he meet defeat and lose everything he holds dear – his soul, his Numbers and… Astral?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: The Countdown Begins
programme.desc: Yuma learns the details of Dr. Faker’s diabolical plan to destroy Astral World! Can Yuma figure out a way to stop Faker, or is the future of Astral World a thing of the past?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: A Trio’s Challenge: Part 1
programme.desc: Kite, Shark and Yuma join forces to take down Dr. Faker! Can this trio work together as a team and put an end to Faker’s fury, or will Faker and his deck prove to be too much of a challenge for these three fearless friends?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: A Trio’s Challenge: Part 2
programme.desc: With the fate of Astral World hanging in the balance, Yuma, Kite and Shark set their sights on stopping Dr. Faker, but before our three heroes can make their final move, Dr. Faker reveals the shocking reason behind his diabolical plan!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: A Trio’s Challenge: Part 3
programme.desc: When a mysterious being from Barian World appears, Yuma, Kite and Shark must work together and battle like never before if they want to save Hart, Astral World… and themselves!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Kite’s Plight: Part 1
programme.desc: The stage is set for the ultimate battle between Yuma and Kite, but just when Yuma’s about to high five the sky, Kite brings him crashing down to earth with a startling revelation!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Kite’s Plight: Part 2
programme.desc: The back and forth battle between Kite and Yuma comes to an exciting conclusion that leaves one of our duelists down for the count! Will Yuma’s dream of pulling out a victory become a reality, or is Kite going to turn this dream into a nightmare?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Attack of the Barians: Part 1
programme.desc: The Barian invasion begins! Yuma faces a dangerous new enemy who will go to any extreme to gain possession of Yuma’s Numbers in order to destroy Astral and his home!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Attack of the Barians: Part 2
programme.desc: Yuma’s battle with a dangerous and powerful soldier of Barian World continues as he strives to keep Astral safe! Can Yuma beat this Barian enemy and his new Chaos Monster, or will Yuma end up losing what is most valuable to him… Astral?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Hard Knox
programme.desc: When pro duelist Devon Knox teaches a special class, Yuma gets taken to the school of hard knocks and learns a valuable lesson about the Barians he won’t soon forget!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Rule Duel
programme.desc: Ray nominates Yuma to run against Caswell for the position of Class Representative, but when the Ray Way takes a turn for the worse, Yuma finds himself facing off against a Student Council President who’s been corrupted by the Barians!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: The Adventures of Artimus Stanleyus
programme.desc: Shark gets hooked into a battle with the Barians when the President of the Comic Book Appreciation Club challenges him to a duel! Can Shark outdraw the competition, or will his Number and life points be erased?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Doom in Bloom
programme.desc: Shark’s sister Rio makes a big splash on her first day at school, but not all the attention she gets is good, especially when she catches the eye of a Barian botanist!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Rivals in the Ring
programme.desc: A new Barian threat arrives on the scene looking to take Yuma’s Numbers, but his plan gets tripped up when he falls head over heels for Tori!

programme.title: The Going Merry’s been stolen by Nami, and the showdown for possession of the Baratie is delayed. But the action’s not dead in the water – Zoro challenges Hawk-Eye Mihawk to a duel!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Hawk-Eye Mihawk! The Great Swordsman Zoro Falls At Sea!

programme.title: The battle begins for possession of the Baratie, with Zeff leading the cooks against Krieg’s pirates. Luffy and crew join the fray, but things aren’t looking too good!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Deadly Foot Technique Bursts Forth! Sanji vs. The Invincible Pearl!

programme.title: Sanji recalls his childhood as an apprentice chef aboard a ship attacked by Red Foot Zeff! When the young Sanji found himself overboard, it was the fearsome captain himself who jumped to the rescue.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Zeff and Sanji's Dream! The Illusory All Blue!

programme.title: As the battle for Baratie rages on, Luffy is forced to take a drastic course of action, and Ghin debates where his loyalties lie.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Cool-headed, Cold-hearted Demon! Pirate Fleet Chief Commander Ghin!

programme.title: The scoundrel Don Krieg appears to have the upper hand in his fight with Luffy. To avoid walking the plank, the rubber man must try a different strategy.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: I Won't Die! Fierce Battle, Luffy vs. Krieg!

programme.title: The standoff between Luffy and Don Krieg takes a turn in favor of the Straw Hats when their captain focuses his onslaught on his opponent’s weaponry.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Conclusion of the Deadly Battle! A Spear of Blind Determination!

programme.title: With Don Krieg defeated, Luffy tries to convince Sanji to join up with the Straw Hats. The skilled cook is interested, but he has something to prove before moving on.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Set Sail! The Seafaring Cook Sets Off With Luffy!

programme.title: With their culinary concerns in good hands, the Straw Hats set off in search of Nami – who’s on a collision course with a deadly foe!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Worst Man in the Eastern Seas! Fishman Pirate Arlong!

programme.title: Zoro is captured by Fishman Arlong and learns a shocking secret about Nami. Unable to believe his ears, he puts the navigator to the ultimate test.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Witch of Cocoyashi Village! Arlong's Female Leader!

programme.title: Luffy and his crew make their way towards Arlong Park and a showdown with its fishy proprietor. Along the way, they discover a treasure map that raises more questions about Nami.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Usopp Dead?! When is Luffy Going to Make Landfall?!

programme.title: A fierce argument over where Nami’s loyalties lie divides the Straw Hat Pirates and only one thing’s for sure – no one is willing to risk their life for a traitor.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Everyone's Gathered! Usopp Speaks the Truth About Nami!

programme.title: Nami’s adopted sister, Nojiko arrives to fill in some details about the skilled mapmaker’s younger days.
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: Nojiko continues the story of Nami’s younger days. Back in the present, Nami gets agonizingly close to a long time goal, but betrayal looms on the horizon.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Survive! Mother Bellemere and Nami's Bond!

programme.title: Nezumi comes to confiscate Nami’s treasure, but who’s he working for? More importantly, who’s Nami working for, and what’s she gonna do with her booty?
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Luffy Rises! Result of the Broken Promise!

programme.title: The Straw Hats’ faith in Nami is restored, and now it’s time for a battle royal! Luffy and the gang are determined to make Arlong pay for mistreating their friend.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Luffy in Big Trouble! Fishmen vs. the Luffy Pirates!

programme.title: The Straw Hats and Arlong’s fishermen are locked in a swashbuckling slugfest, but things take a bad turn when Luffy gets trapped beneath the waves.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Luffy Submerged! Zoro vs. Hatchan the Octopus!

programme.title: While his friends work to free the captain of the Straw Hats, cowardly Usopp finds himself in a position to shed his yellow streak and make his father proud.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Proud Warriors! Sanji and Usopp's Fierce Battles!

programme.title: Nami must decide between letting Arlong maintain his hold over her, or joining the Straw Hats and leading the oppressed villagers against the tyrant Fishman.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Luffy at Full Power! Nami's Determination and the Straw Hat!

programme.title: Arlong better watch his back-fins, because Captain Luffy knows about all the horrible things he did to Nami – and it makes his blood boil.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Explosion! Fishman Arlong's Fierce Assault From the Sea!

programme.title: Something about Nami’s former prison gives Luffy an added burst of strength. He’s so moved by her terrible past that he vows to destroy all of Arlong Park!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: End of the Fishman Empire! Nami's My Friend!

programme.title: After a grueling fight, Luffy defeats Arlong and succeeds in destroying his headquarters. The merry marauders enjoy the fruits of victory while Nami makes peace with her turbulent past.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Setting Out with a Smile! Farewell, Hometown Cocoyashi Village!

programme.title: Finally, the day has arrived where Luffy’s face is on an authentic wanted poster! Now there are enemies in hot pursuit as the crew makes waves for Logue Town – the final resting place of Gold Roger!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Bounty! Straw Hat Luffy Becomes Known to the World!

programme.title: Buggy gets marooned on an island inhabited by unusual creatures and tangles with the island’s caretaker, Gaimon. If he is to finally destroy Luffy, Buggy must cast his lot with a mysterious woman.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Chase Straw Hat! Little Buggy's Big Adventure!

programme.title: The Buggy Pirates fight each other for the right to take their lost captain’s place. While they’re busy beating each other’s brains out, a cannibalistic tribe makes plans to have something special for dinner.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Wait is Over! The Return of Captain Buggy!

programme.title: The Straw Hats arrive at Logue Town, and each crewmember embarks upon a mission of a more personal nature. While his crew shops, Luffy goes in search of sacred ground.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Town of the Beginning and the End! Landfall at Logue Town!

programme.title: Luffy has a run-in with Captain Smoker, and his failure to keep a low profile helps Buggy draw a bead on him. Elsewhere, Zoro takes a chance that his skill can overcome a dangerous curse.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Kitetsu III and Yubashiri! Zoro's New Swords and the Woman Sergeant Major!

programme.title: Usopp finds an amazing pair of sharpshooter’s goggles, but they lead to a run-in with Daddy the Parent – the greatest gunslinger ever! Now, the Straw Hat marksman is headed for the deadliest of all duels.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Usopp vs. Daddy the Parent! Showdown at High!

programme.title: A cooking competition with the fiery chef Carmen rekindles Sanji’s dreams of the legendary All Blue.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Fiery Cooking Battle? Sanji vs. the Beautiful Chef!

programme.title: Buggy and his mysterious female ally trap Luffy on the same platform where Gold Roger was executed. He is to be killed for his offenses against Buggy, but Zoro and Sanji attempt a daring rescue mission.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Buggy's Revenge! The Man Who Smiles On the Execution Platform!

programme.title: As a storm batters Logue Town, Buggy, Alvida, and Captain Smoker close in on Luffy for a stirring final showdown!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Legend Has Started! Head for the Grand Line!

programme.title: The discovery of a small girl adrift in an abandoned lifeboat interrupts Luffy and his crew’s voyage to the Grand Line.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Precursor to a New Adventure! Apis, a Mysterious Girl!

programme.title: After escaping the clutches of the Marine fleet, the Straw Hats soon find themselves in an equally dangerous predicament – stranded in the Calm Belt!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Miraculous Creature! Apis's Secret and The Legendary Island!

programme.title: The Straw Hats want to return Apis’s dragon to his nest, but the Marines have them surrounded. Looks like it’s time for another daring escape!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Eric Attacks! Great Escape from Warship Island!

programme.title: Arrival, (2016, Science fiction)
programme.desc: When mysterious spacecraft touch down across the globe, an elite team - led by expert translator Louise Banks (Academy Award® nominee Amy Adams) – races against time to decipher their intent.

programme.title: The Core, (2003, Action)
programme.desc: The Earth has stopped rotating because of a change in the planet's core temperature. To restore the normal temperature, astronauts must travel to the center and detonate a nuclear bomb before the core superheats and destroys all life on the surface.

programme.title: Infinite, (2021, Science fiction)
programme.desc: Evan McCauley has skills he never learned and memories of places he has never visited. Self-medicated and on the brink of a mental breakdown, a secret group that call themselves Infinites come to his rescue, revealing that his memories are real.

programme.title: Arrival, (2016, Science fiction)
programme.desc: When mysterious spacecraft touch down across the globe, an elite team - led by expert translator Louise Banks (Academy Award® nominee Amy Adams) – races against time to decipher their intent.

programme.title: The Mortal Instruments, (2013, Fantasy)
programme.desc: Clary's life is turned upside down when her mother is kidnapped and it's revealed that they are shadowhunters who are tasked with protecting the world from vampires, werewolves and demons. Clary must discover her talents and save her mother.

programme.title: Infinite, (2021, Science fiction)
programme.desc: Evan McCauley has skills he never learned and memories of places he has never visited. Self-medicated and on the brink of a mental breakdown, a secret group that call themselves Infinites come to his rescue, revealing that his memories are real.

programme.title: Starship Troopers, (1997, Science fiction)
programme.desc: Courageous soldiers travel to the distant and desolate Klendathu system for the ultimate showdown between the species.

programme.title: The Magnificent Seven Ride!, (1972, Western)
programme.desc: When his wife is killed, Marshal Chris Adams (Lee Van Cleef) discovers that a ruthless horde of marauders have killed all the men -- and will come back for the women -- in a nearby border town...unless The Magnificent Seven can stop them!

programme.title: Heart Of The Rio Grande, (1942, Western)
programme.desc: Gene Autry tames a spoiled teenage shrew sent to a Dude Ranch for the summer and in the process humanizes her father into being a better parent. Action includes stampeding horses, and a bold rescue!

programme.title: Sunset in Wyoming, (1941, Western)
programme.desc: Conscientious rancher Gene Autry must save his valley from flooding caused by a lumber company that is stripping the land. Gene hatches a plan to declare the mountain a state park and wildlife shrine.

programme.title: Vera Cruz, (1954, Western)
programme.desc: In this epic Western, two shady mercenaries (Gary Cooper, Burt Lancaster) in Mexico during the 1866 revolution are hired to escort a Countess and her gold to the Mexican army in Vera Cruz and find themselves at odds with the army…and each other!

programme.title: Valdez Is Coming, (1971, Western)
programme.desc: In this rousing Western, when a greedy rancher causes the death of an innocent man, former sheriff Bob Valdez (Burt Lancaster) orders him to provide financial support for the widow. But when he refuses, Valdez vows to exact justice at any cost!

programme.title: Chato's Land, (1972, Western)
programme.desc: Chato, a half-Apache horseman, is on the run from a blood-thirsty posse led by an ex-Confederate officer, who is determined to see him dead. Eventually, the pursued and the pursuers will become reversed, thanks to the unforgiving, cruel desert.

programme.title: Hang 'Em High, (1968, Action)
programme.desc: Clint Eastwood stars in this brazen tale about a rampaging band of vigilantes who make two mistakes: they hang the wrong man and they don't finish the job. Inger Stevens, Pat Hingle, Bruce Dern & Dennis Hopper co-star in this action-packed western.

programme.title: Once Upon a Time in the West, (1969, Western)
programme.desc: The epic story of a mysterious stranger with a harmonica who joins forces with a notorious desperado to protect a beautiful widow from a ruthless assassin working for the railroad.

programme.title: Rio Grande, (1950, Western)
programme.desc: Lt. Col. Yorke leads his cavalry troops to the Rio Grande to fight a warring tribe. Yorke’s toughest battle lies ahead when his unorthodox plan to outwit the elusive Apaches leads to possible court-martial.

programme.title: Hondo, (1953, Western)
programme.desc: John Wayne plays Hondo Lane, a cavalry rider who becomes the protector of Angie Lowe as well as a father figure to her boy, Johnny. Angie, determinedly awaiting the return of her husband, refuses to leave their homestead despite the growing danger.

programme.title: Gangs Of New York, (2003, Historical Drama)
programme.desc: Martin Scorsese's epic film set in mid-19th century Lower Manhattan tells the story of a young Irish immigrant (Leonardo DiCaprio) seeking revenge against the rival gang leader who killed his father.

programme.title: The Aviator, (2004, Independent Drama)
programme.desc: The early years of larger-than-life American figure Howard Hughes are captured by legendary director Martin Scorsese, in this acclaimed Oscar-winning biopic starring Leonardo DiCaprio and Cate Blanchett.

programme.title: Zodiac, (2007, Thriller)
programme.desc: Based on the Robert Graysmith books about the real life notorious Zodiac, a serial killer who terrorized San Francisco with a string of seemingly random murders during the 1960s and 1970s.

programme.title: Gangs Of New York, (2003, Historical Drama)
programme.desc: Martin Scorsese's epic film set in mid-19th century Lower Manhattan tells the story of a young Irish immigrant (Leonardo DiCaprio) seeking revenge against the rival gang leader who killed his father.

programme.desc: The early years of larger-than-life American figure Howard Hughes are captured by legendary director Martin Scorsese, in this acclaimed Oscar-winning biopic starring Leonardo DiCaprio and Cate Blanchett.

programme.title: Mean Girls, (2004, Comedy)
programme.desc: Cady thinks she understands "survival of the fittest." However, the law of the wild takes a whole new meaning when the homeschooled 15-year-old enters public high school for the first time.

programme.title: Mean Girls 2, (2011, Romantic comedy)
programme.desc: The Plastics are back in the follow-up to the smash-hit Mean Girls... and now the clique is more fashionable, funny and ferocious than ever!

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Ami spots Nephrite and follows him to an animation studio that is making the Sailor V movie. Ami calls Usagi and Rei so they can investigate.
programme.sub-title: Protect the Children's Dreams: Friendship Through Anime

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: The Kingdom of Diamonds is hosting a party to reveal their treasure to the world. Both the Sailor Guardians and the Dark Kingdom crash the party.
programme.sub-title: Romance Under the Moon: Usagi's First Kiss

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Naru has fallen in love with Masato Sanjoin. Knowing that Sanjoin is really Nephrite, Usagi tries to convince Naru to give up on her feelings.
programme.sub-title: Wish upon a Star: Naru's First Love

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Nephrite uncovers Sailor Moon’s identity as Usagi. His attempt to finish her off is cut short when he learns that Naru has been kidnapped by Zoisite.
programme.sub-title: Naru's Tears: Nephrite Dies for Love

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: A new girl named Makoto Kino transfers to Usagi’s school, but her tough attitude seems to scare everyone away. Usagi quickly becomes friends with her.
programme.sub-title: Jupiter, the Powerful Girl in Love

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: The Sailor Guardians grow in strength with its newest member Sailor Jupiter joining the team. Sailor Moon is appointed as team leader.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi learns that a transfer student named Ryo Urawa seems to have a crush on Ami, and tries to help him out.
programme.sub-title: Crushing on Ami: The Boy Who Can See the Future

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi and Naru attend an art exhibit by Yumemi Yumeno. Usagi and Mamoru are both asked by Yumemi to become models for her latest painting.
programme.sub-title: The Painting of Love: Usagi and Mamoru Get Closer

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi and Makoto discover Motoki has a girlfriend named Reika. His relationship is in jeopardy due to Reika’s chance to study abroad.
programme.sub-title: Total Chaos: The Messy Love Rectangle

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Grandpa Hino has become emotionally unstable, causing Rei to worry. The new apprentice Yuichiro tries to cheer her up.
programme.sub-title: Grandpa Loses Control: Rei in Danger

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi and friends meet a girl who they believe holds the final Rainbow Crystal. But they realize it’s her pet cat that possesses the Rainbow Crystal!
programme.sub-title: Loved and Chased: Luna's Worst Day Ever

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Umino seems to have fallen in love with Naru. Naru only considers Umino a friend, so Usagi decides to play Cupid and urges them to go on a date.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: When the exploits of a Sailor Moon imposter become quite the sensation, the real Sailor Guardians step in to investigate.
programme.sub-title: Enter Venus, the Last Sailor Guardian

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Now that Sailor Venus has joined the team, all of the Sailor Guardians are finally together! Zoisite has discovered that Tuxedo Mask is Mamoru Chiba.
programme.sub-title: The Shining Silver Crystal: The Moon Princess Appears

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Tuxedo Mask is wounded while protecting Sailor Moon. The seven Rainbow Crystals gather and she is transformed into Serenity.
programme.sub-title: Returning Memories: Usagi and Mamoru's Past

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi is haunted by dreams of Tuxedo Mask, who has been abducted by the Dark Kingdom. Minako takes Usagi to a popular hair salon hoping it will help.
programme.sub-title: Usagi's Confusion: Is Tuxedo Mask Evil?

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi decides to take the Princess Seminar course and the other Sailor Guardians join her. This is actually a trap set up by the Dark Kingdom.
programme.sub-title: Let's Become a Princess: Usagi's Bizarre Training

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi and her friends go to a ski resort to participate in the Moon Princess Contest, unaware that it’s Kunzite’s plan to eliminate the Moon Princess.
programme.sub-title: The Snow, the Mountains, Friendship and Monsters

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Figure-skating Janelyn & Misha offer to coach. Usagi and her friends decide to investigate. Makoto begins to receive personal lessons from Misha.
programme.sub-title: Paired with a Monster: Mako, the Ice Skating Queen

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi goes on a family vacation, where she is unexpectedly reunited with Mamoru. But Mamoru no longer remembers Usagi or even who he really is.
programme.sub-title: The Legendary Lake Yokai: The Bond of Usagi's Family

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: The Dark Kingdom is trying to revive the Seven Great Monsters. Sailor Mercury and Jupiter scramble to protect Ryo Urawa.
programme.sub-title: I Won't Run Away from Love Anymore: Ami vs. Mamoru

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Minako receives a surprise visit from Katarina, Minako’s former partner. A tragic incident forced them to go their separate ways.
programme.sub-title: Sailor Venus's Past: Minako's Tragic Love

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Sailor Moon and the other Sailor Guardians appear to have a falling-out. But it’s all part of the plan to locate the enemy’s hideout.
programme.sub-title: Usagi Abandoned: The Falling-Out of the Sailor Guardians

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Sailor Venus finds the Dark Kingdom's hideout. The Sailor Guardians fall into Kunzite’s trap, which hurls them into the past.
programme.sub-title: Usagi's Awakening: A Message from the Distant Past

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: The Sailor Guardians head into the Arctic Circle. Queen Beryl sends the DD Girls. The Sailor Guardians fall as they try to defeat the DD Girls.
programme.sub-title: Death of the Sailor Guardians: The Tragic Final Battle

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Sailor Moon attempts to free Endymion from Queen Beryl’s control. Sailor Moon is forced to fight the man she loves.
programme.sub-title: Usagi's Eternal Wish: A Brand New Life

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Having lost all memory of being Sailor Moon, Usagi now lives her life as an ordinary girl.
programme.sub-title: Moon Returns: The Mysterious Aliens Appear

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Sailor Moon finds herself facing new enemies from outer space. The two aliens disguise themselves as humans to go after other human energy.
programme.sub-title: For Love and for Justice: Sailor Guardians Once Again

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi, Mako, and Ami see a boy attacked by one of Ail and An’s Cardian monsters. To Mako’s surprise, the boy turns out to be her childhood friend.
programme.sub-title: For Whom Is the White Rose? The Moonlight Knight Appears

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi goes to a virtual reality arcade in the Juban District, where she unexpectedly runs into Mamoru, as well as Seijuro and Natsumi.
programme.sub-title: Usagi's Crisis: The Tiara Stops Working

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi and her friends are enjoying the cherry blossoms when the Cardian Leshy attacks. The Sailor Guardians are caught.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Minako befriends a little girl named Mie who is a huge fan of Sailor Moon. Meanwhile, Ail and An send a Cardian to steal energy from young children.
programme.sub-title: The Targeted Kindergarteners: Venus to the Rescue

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi and Mamoru find themselves looking after a baby boy while his mother is recovering from having her energy stolen by a Cardian.

programme.desc: Mia (Emma Stone), an aspiring actress, and Sebastian (Ryan Gosling), a dedicated jazz musician, are struggling to make ends meet in a city known for crushing hopes and breaking hearts.

programme.title: Céu em Chamas, (1997)
programme.desc: 1997. Midori, uma relutante noiva japonesa, forja seu sequestro durante a lua-de-mel em Sidney. Sozinha e desnorteada num país estranho, é feita refém num assalto a banco. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Russell Crowe, Youki Kudoh, Kenji Isomura, Ray Barrett, Robert Mammone, Petru Gheorghiu, Anthony Phelan, Matthew Dyktynski, Colin Hay, Susan Prior Diretor: Craig Lahiff

programme.title: O Regresso, (2015)
programme.desc: 2015. Em uma expedição de comércio de peles na década de 1820, um homem luta para sobreviver depois de ser atacado por um urso e abandonado por sua própria equipe de caça. Gêneros: Drama Elenco: Leonardo DiCaprio, Tom Hardy, Domhnall Gleeson, Will Poulter, Forrest Goodluck Diretor: Alejandro G. Iñárritu

programme.title: Fogo contra Fogo, (2020)
programme.desc: 2020. Um bombeiro fora de serviço testemunha um assassinato nas mãos de uma gangue de gangsters. Ele entra no programa de proteção a testemunhas até depor, mas não pode se esconder por muito tempo da gangue, então decide agir por conta própria. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Josh Duhamel, Bruce Willis, Rosario Dawson Diretor: David Barrett

programme.title: B13-U 13º Distrito - Ultimato, (2004)
programme.desc: 2004. Damien e Leito estão retornando ao Distrito 13 em uma missão para levar a paz ao setor controlado por cinco líderes de gangues diferentes, antes que os serviços secretos da cidade tomem medidas drásticas para resolver o problema. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Cyril Raffaelli, David Belle, Philippe Torreton Diretor: Patrick Alessandrin

programme.title: O Regresso, (2015)

programme.title: Soldado Universal 3: Regeneração, (2009)
programme.desc: 2009. Um soldado ressuscitado e geneticamente modificado enfrenta seus inimigos, contratados por terroristas nucleares. Gêneros: Sci-Fi & Fantasy Elenco: Van Damme, Dolph Ludgren Diretor: John Hyams

programme.title: O Último Herói, (2019)
programme.desc: 2019. Quando jovem, Andrey Rodin fez parte de um programa secreto de treinamento de espiões. Vinte anos depois, ele vive em paz até que seu pai, um ex-agente do governo quem Andrey pensava já estar morto, pede ajuda, o levando a aceitar uma missão. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Alexander Petrov, Svetlana Khodchenkova, Vladimir Mashkov, Marina Petrenko, Konstantin Lavronenko, Anastasiya Todorescu, Yan Alabushev, Artyom Grigory Diretor: Karen Oganesyan

programme.title: O Alvo Final, (2010)
programme.desc: 2010. Depois de matar o dono de um bar em uma briga, Bobby Kalinowsky, um ex-membro do SEAL, deve procurar sua filha sequestrada. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Rob Van Dam, Dave Bautista, Onarion Diretor: David DeFalco

programme.title: Sem Lei, (2011)
programme.desc: 2011. Um grupo de três amigos planeja um grande roubo que acaba dando errado quando um deles se revela um traidor. Enganado, Sonny decide assumir o problema de frente e busca vingança contra o antigo parceiro. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Bruce, Phillippe, Ryan, Willis Diretor: Mike Gunther

programme.title: Vice: A Máquina, (2015)
programme.desc: 2015. Julian Michaels é um consagrado designer cuja obra maior é Vice, um resort onde as pessoas podem fazer absolutamente tudo o que desejar, sem se ater a leis ou regras, já que apenas convive com robôs travestidos de humanos. Gêneros: Sci-Fi & Fantasy Elenco: Bruce Willis, Thomas Jane, Ambyr Childers Diretor: Brian A. Miller

programme.title: Ameaça no Espaço, (2020)

Gêneros: Sci-Fi & Fantasy Elenco: Cody Kearsley, Bruce Willis, Rachel Nichols Diretor: John Suits

programme.title: Xeque-Mate, (2006)

Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Josh Hartnett, Bruce Willis, Lucy Liu, Ben Kingsley, Morgan Freeman, Stanley Tucci Diretor: Paul McGuigan

programme.title: Vou te Seguir na Escuridão, (2020)
programme.desc: 2020. Uma mulher deprimida com a morte dos pais se envolve com um homem encantador. Quando ele desaparece misteriosamente após entrar em um prédio mal assombrado, ela promete encontrá-lo mesmo que tenha que atravessar para o mundo do sobrenatural. Gêneros: Horror Elenco: Frank Ashmore, Jessee Foudray, Leah Pipes, Melinda Cohen, Mischa Barton, Ronnie Clark, Ryan Eggold, Ward Edmondson Diretor: Mark Edwin Robinson

programme.title: Infectados, (2010)
programme.desc: 2010. Após perder contato com um grupo de pesquisadores em uma ilha remota, uma corporação militar contrata um grupo de cientistas para descobrir o que deu errado. Gêneros: Sci-Fi & Fantasy Elenco: Brandon Laatsch, Christina Jones, Eric Raymond Lim, Jeff Castle, Matt Lagan, Michael Cummings, Michelle Ehrman, Tate Ammons, Tess Panzer Diretor: Niko Pueringer, Sam Gorski

programme.title: 4 Cavaleiros do Apocalipse, (2022)
programme.desc: 2022. Um time de cientistas precisa correr contra o tempo para impedir uma série de desastres ao redor do planeta, anunciando que o apocalipse está próximo. Gêneros: Sci-Fi & Fantasy Elenco: Arie Thompson, Brandon Alan Smith, Bridger Buckley, Dominique Swain, Eric St. John, Eva Ceja, Isaac J. Cruz, Preston Geer, DX Machina, Stamaur Mitchell Diretor: Geoff Meed

programme.title: Uma Aventura Selvagem, (2021)
programme.desc: 2021. Dois irmãos são atacados por animais selvagens enquanto procuram por seu pai desaparecido no meio da floresta amazônica. Mas à medida em que continuam sua aventura, eles começam a perceber que existe algo muito mais sinistro por trás desses ataques. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Alyson Gorske, Benny Bernard Jr., Christian Dejesus, Jack Pearson, Jamie Petitto, Rey'Von Miller, Richard Grieco, Wade Hunt Williams, Christian DeJesus, Alejandro Maysonet Diretor: Noah Luke

programme.title: Valan - Vale dos Anjos, (2019)
programme.desc: 2019. O policial Peter investiga diversos desaparecimentos de jovens mulheres em um caso de rede de tráfico sexual. Gêneros: Drama Elenco: András Hatházi, Annamária Albu, Csaba Krisztik, Emõke Pál, Júlia Nyakó, László Mátray, Marthi Alpár, Tollas Gábor Diretor: Béla Bagota

programme.title: 1988. O primeiro grupo de imigrantes de Kaima finalmente chega à Terra. Porém, a tripulação morre por causa do clima inabitável para quem vem de Kaima. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Tetsuo Kurata, Go Inoue, Atsuko Takahata Diretor: Masao Minowa
programme.desc: Kamen Rider Black RX - T01E38

programme.title: 1988. Um homem misterioso aparece diante de Shigeru. Crianças são raptadas e transformadas em guerreiros por General Jark, sendo este mais um plano para eliminar RX. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Tetsuo Kurata, Go Inoue, Atsuko Takahata Diretor: Masao Minowa
programme.desc: Kamen Rider Black RX - T01E39

programme.title: 1988. Uma risada sinistra ecoa em um bloco de condomínios pacífico. Assim que Issamu adentra o condomínio fantasma, o Guerreiro Kaima Gainajagran surge diante dele e desafia RX. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Tetsuo Kurata, Go Inoue, Atsuko Takahata Diretor: Masao Minowa
programme.desc: Kamen Rider Black RX - T01E40

programme.title: 1988. Para derrotar RX, a Chefe da Tribo Demoníaca, avó de Maribaron, a Feiticeira Kaima Medusa dos 100 Olhos, desperta depois de um longo sono de 100 anos. A vida de Kyoko e de seus amigos está prestes a ser tomada pelo poder dos olhos da Medusa. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Tetsuo Kurata, Go Inoue, Atsuko Takahata Diretor: Masao Minowa
programme.sub-title: O Terror da Medusa dos 100 Olhos

programme.desc: Kamen Rider Black RX - T01E42

programme.title: 1988. Após vencer Gatridon, resultando na morte de Gadorian, desta vez quem decide se opor a RX é Gatezon. Em meio a isso, Dasmader analisa friamente os movimentos de RX, parecendo ter encontrado uma nova maneira de dar fim ao King Stone de RX. programme.title: 1988. General Jark toma as rédeas da situação e vai diretamente ao encontro de RX. O caçador de espadas também está a sua procura. O que acontecerá? programme.title: 1988. É o aniversário da morte da mãe dos Yamashi e Marabu fica sentido por não guardar nenhuma lembrança, porém ela aparece misteriosamente depois de 8 anos. programme.title: 2020. Assim que acordou, Anko começa a lembrar da Ilha do Demônio, um lugar que ela visitou uma vez com seu sensei, Orochimaru. Anko revela a verdade por trás dos desaparecimentos e do segredo sobre o corpo de Isaribi. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Infiltração : A Armadilha! - T01E171

programme.title: 2020. Amachi e sua gangue começam o ataque contra o navio do governo. Naruto e os outros escapam da Ilha do Demônio, mas o que eles encontram é a frota do País do Mar à beira da aniquilação. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Desespero : Um Coração Partido! - T01E172

programme.title: 2020. Os ninjas da Folha e Amachi se enfrentam no mar. Com a ajuda de Naruto, Amachi é derrotado, mas um monstro aparece. Naruto invoca Gamabunta para derrotá-lo. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Batalha No Mar : O Poder Liberado!
programme.desc: Naruto: Batalha No Mar : O Poder Liberado! - T01E173

programme.title: 2020. Kunijiro visita Tsunade e escolhe Naruto para guiar seu garoto por um dia na vida de um ninja! Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Impossível!Arte Ninja: Jutsu Estilo Dinheiro! - T01E174

programme.title: 2020. Agari Kaisen, um amigo de Tsunade, pede a Naruto, Kiba, e Hinata que procurem um tesouro escondido. Achando ser uma tarefa fácil por terem um mapa, Tsunade ameaça mandá-los de volta à Academia, se falharem. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: A Caça Ao Tesouro Começa! - T01E175

programme.title: 2020. Depois de escaparem da caverna, Naruto e os outros vão atrás da clã Kedouin para impedir seu plano, mas a Aldeia Oculta da Folha já está sendo atacada. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Corra! Esquive-Se Em Zigue-Zague! Caçar Ou Ser Caçado!
programme.desc: Naruto: Corra! Esquive-Se Em Zigue-Zague! Caçar Ou Ser Caçado! - T01E176

programme.title: 2020. Naruto descobre que Jiraiya está aprontando algo. Jiraiya diz que está ocupado preparando seu manuscrito antes do prazo final. Naruto, impaciente e irritado, escreve seu próprio manuscrito para Jiraiya! Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Por Favor, Senhor Carteiro! - T01E177

programme.title: 2020. A Aldeia Oculta nas Estrelas pede à Aldeia Oculta da Folha para proteger uma estrela. A estrela, na verdade, é um meteorito que caiu 200 anos atrás, e dizem que ela possui poderes misteriosos. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Encontro! Um Menino Com Nome De Estrela
programme.desc: Naruto: Encontro! Um Menino Com Nome De Estrela - T01E178

programme.title: 2020. Naruto e os outros investigam o paradeiro da estrela roubada. O time suspeita alguém da Aldeia Oculta nas Estrelas porque o ninja que roubou a estrela usou a arte ninja da aldeia, Kujaku. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: A Inesquecível Canção De Ninar - T01E179

programme.title: 2020. Akahoshi, o ninja mascarado que sequestrou Sumaru, pretende usar Sumaru para chamar o ninja misterioso que roubou a estrela. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Jutsu Oculto! O Preço Da Arte Ninja: Kujaku
programme.desc: Naruto: Jutsu Oculto! O Preço Da Arte Ninja: Kujaku - T01E180

programme.title: 2020. O ninja mascarado e Naruto caem nas profundezas do vale. Ao tratar as feridas de Naruto, o ninja mascarado conta o motivo de ter roubado a estrela. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Hoshikage : A Verdade Enterrada - T01E181

programme.title: 2020. O corpo de Natsuhi é afetado pelos efeitos da estrela. Ela controla a estrela e confronta Akahoshi desesperadamente, mas Sumaru é levado como refém. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Reunião : O Tempo Restante - T01E182

programme.title: 2020. Sumaru sente a morte da mãe e foge furioso. Naruto é incapaz de pará-lo. Para salvar Sumaru, Hokuto e Mizura arriscam suas vidas para revelar a verdade por trás do treinamento com a estrela. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: A Estrela Radiante - T01E183

programme.title: 2020. Akamaru é ferido por um shinobi rival de outra nação. O shinobi usou uma habilidade de luta que espalha bactéria pelo corpo do oponente, infectando as capacidades mentais da vítima. Isso faz com que Akamura entre numa fúria incontrolável. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: O Longo Dia De Kiba - T01E184

programme.title: 2020. Uma misteriosa criatura se anexa a Naruto durante um treinamento na floresta. Tsunade começa a achar que é a criatura lendária chamada Onbaa. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: A Lenda Da Aldeia Da Folha: O Onbaa!
programme.desc: Naruto: A Lenda Da Aldeia Da Folha: O Onbaa! - T01E185

programme.title: 2020. Naruto e Shino recebem uma missão para providenciar segurança durante um funeral da família Kagetsu. Mas, eles logo percebem que a verdadeira missão é ajudar o filho mais velho realizar o estranho testamento do pai. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: O Risonho Shino - T01E186

programme.title: 2020. Uma fumaça preta e ameaçadora aparece sobre o País dos Vegetais, e de repente, um ninja misterioso ataca Choji e companhia. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Aberto Para Negócios! O Serviço De Mudanças Da Folha
programme.desc: Naruto: Aberto Para Negócios! O Serviço De Mudanças Da Folha - T01E187

programme.title: 2020. Ao interrogar Yurinoshin e Shun, a equipe da Folha aprende sobre a verdadeira identidade de Shun. Ela é a princesa Haruna, a única filha do senhor feudal do País dos Vegetais. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: O Mistério Dos Mercadores Atingidos - T01E188

programme.title: 2020. Naruto e os outros são atacados por Ruiga, o primeiro ninja maligno, que consegue tirar água da terra para usar como armas. Naruto logo descobre um jeito de ter a vantagem na batalha. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Um Ilimitado Abastecimento De Ferramentas Ninja!
programme.desc: Naruto: Um Ilimitado Abastecimento De Ferramentas Ninja! - T01E189

programme.title: 2020. Naruto é atacado de novo pelo segundo ninja maligno, Jiga. Jiga ameaça a vida de Naruto quando Hinata chega correndo para salvá-lo. Hinata consegue resistir as ameaças e começa a lutar! Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: O Byakugan Vê O Ponto Cego!
programme.desc: Naruto: O Byakugan Vê O Ponto Cego! - T01E190

programme.title: 2020. Renga confronta Naruto e Hinata. Declarando que já derrotou outros, ele avança e ordena a Naruto que lhe entregue a princesa. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Previsão: Morte! Céu Nublado Com Chance De Sol!
programme.desc: Naruto: Previsão: Morte! Céu Nublado Com Chance De Sol! - T01E191

programme.title: 2020. A princesa engordou por estar nervosa e quer que Ino finja de princesa para poder ir ao primeiro encontro com um príncipe que ela adora. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Ino Grita! Paraíso Da Gordura! - T01E192

programme.title: 2020. Lee abre um dojo por achar que não está treinando o suficiente. Ele espera que desafiantes venham ao dojo para lutá-lo. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: O Desafio Dojo!A Juventude Tem Tudo A Ver Com Paixão
programme.desc: Naruto: O Desafio Dojo!A Juventude Tem Tudo A Ver Com Paixão - T01E193

programme.title: 2020. A primeira-dama do País do Mel e seu cortejo desapareceram. Naruto, Kiba e Hinata vão numa missão e descobrem um castelo amedrontador no meio do caminho. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: A Misteriosa Maldição Do Castelo Mal-Assombrado
programme.desc: Naruto: A Misteriosa Maldição Do Castelo Mal-Assombrado - T01E194

programme.title: 2020. Durante a examinação médica de Lee, ele descobre que sua rede de chacra está muito prejudicada. Guy o leva para treinar na Academia para animá-lo. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: A Terceira Super Besta! - T01E195

programme.title: 2020. Procurando se vingar da morte de seu pai, Genho, a verdadeira identidade de Yagura e o mais velho dos irmãos Ryudoin, confronta Guy usando um jutsu distinto. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Confronto De Sangue-Quente: Aluno Contra Sensei
programme.desc: Naruto: Confronto De Sangue-Quente: Aluno Contra Sensei - T01E196

programme.title: 2020. Os Caçadores Especiais ANBU suspeitam que Genno, um carpinteiro da Aldeia Oculta da Folha, roubou plantas importantes da aldeia. Tsunade determina que quem usou Genno pretende atacar a aldeia e coloca todos em um Alerta de Segurança Nível-S! Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Crise: A Reunião Dos Onze Da Folha!
programme.desc: Naruto: Crise: A Reunião Dos Onze Da Folha! - T01E197

programme.title: 2020. Os Caçadores Especiais ANBU hipnotizam Naruto para extrair os motivos de Genno. Sem muito sucesso, a Aldeia das Cachoeiras irá conduzir manobras perto da fronteira da aldeia. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: O Anbu Desiste? A Lembrança De Naruto
programme.desc: Naruto: O Anbu Desiste? A Lembrança De Naruto - T01E198

programme.title: 2020. Durante a procura pelas plantas espalhadas, Naruto e sua equipe percebem que as ações de Genno é uma distração. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: O Erro Do Alvo - T01E199

programme.title: Street Fighter Alpha: O Filme
programme.desc: 2001. Os mestres das artes marciais, Ken e Ryu, se unem por causa da morte misteriosa de seu mestre, mas agora os dois guerreiros devem superar um desafio que jamais enfrentaram antes. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Casey Hart, Keith Burgess, Steven Jay Blum, Mathew Austin Diretor: Shinji Ushiro

programme.desc: 2018. Boruto e companhia trabalham juntos para conseguir a Escama Invertida de Garaga, mas a batalha se mostra difícil, uma vez que Garaga tem o poder de sentir a localização dos inimigos e transformá-los em pedra. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Vagner Fagundes, Diego Lima, Robson Kumode, Diego Marques, Úrsula Bezerra, Lucas Gama, Luiza Porto, Mariana Zink Diretor: Hiroyuki Yamashita

programme.desc: 2020. Junto com Pakkun, Naruto, Sakura e Shikamaru estão em busca de Sasuke. Pakkun sente nove dos homens de Orochimaru vindo por eles. Gêneros: Anime

programme.title: Naruto: Uma luta incomparável, Hokage Contra Hokage! - T01E71
programme.sub-title: Uma luta incomparável, Hokage Contra Hokage!
programme.desc: 2020. Orochimaru prende o Hokage dentro de uma barreira e continuam batalhando. Gêneros: Anime

programme.title: Naruto: Um Erro Do Passado ... Um Rosto Revelado ! - T01E72
programme.sub-title: Um Erro Do Passado ... Um Rosto Revelado !
programme.desc: 2020. Sasuke finalmente alcança Gaara, Temari e Kankuro. Kankuro escapa com Gaara, deixando Temari para encarar Sasuke. Gêneros: Anime

programme.title: Naruto: Técnica Secreta Proibida ... Selo Ceifeiro Da Morte ! - T01E73
programme.sub-title: Técnica Secreta Proibida ... Selo Ceifeiro Da Morte !
programme.desc: 2020. A intensa batalha entre Orochimaru e o Hokage continua. Finalmente, o Hokage decide usar um jutsu que Orochimaru não conhece, o Jutsu de Selamanto conhecido como Selo Ceifeiro da Morte. Gêneros: Anime

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Laços - T01E48
programme.desc: 2008. Quebrar a barreira de cinco selos ativa uma armadilha, e a equipe Guy enfrenta cópias idênticas de si mesmos. Deidara e Sasori lutam para se apoderar do jinchuriki. Forçado a seguir Naruto, Kakashi pede que vovó Chiyo e Sakura não façam nada precipitado. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Algo Importante... - T01E49
programme.desc: 2008. A luta entre avó e neto começa. Para derrotar o verdadeiro Sasori dentro do boneco, Hiruko deve ser destruído primeiro. Só a própria avó consegue entender as armadilhas complexas de Sasori, mas é Sakura que deve dar o golpe final. Que estratégia usarão? Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: A História Do Álbum Ilustrado - T01E50
programme.desc: 2008. Chiyo e Sakura expõem Sasori, que não envelheceu nada nos últimos vinte anos. Chiyo fica mais chocada com o segundo boneco que Sasori revela. Sasori foi quem planejou o desaparecimento do kazecage. Uma equipe ninja se dirige a um certo local. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Hunter x Hunter - T02E49
programme.desc: 2013. Knuckle e Morel estão dominados pela velocidade de Cheetu, mas têm uma chance. Knuckle diz sobre sua experiência, enquanto Morel exala fumaça branca. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Dlaigelles Silva, Vitor Mello, Wallace Raj, Gabriel Martins, Pedro Volpato Diretor: Hiroshi Koujina

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Uma Adição Indesejada - T01E35
programme.desc: 2007. Para proteger sua aldeia da argila explosiva de Deidara, Gaara usa seu chakra para criar um escudo. A aldeia é salva a um enorme custo. Gaara fica vulnerável. As tentativas de seus companheiros são inúteis, e Gaara acaba caindo nas mãos de Deidara. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: O Falso Sorriso - T01E36
programme.desc: 2007. Gaara é arrastado para longe por Deidara. Kankuro sai com um pelotão para salvar Gaara, mas os Akatsuki haviam instalado armadilhas engenhosas. Determinado, Kankuro encontra sozinho os Akatsuki. A nova equipe de Naruto comemora sua primeira missão. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Sem Título - T01E37
programme.desc: 2007. Temari encontra Kakashi e sua equipe. Naruto explode de raiva pelos Akatsuki. Como também hospeda uma besta de cauda dentro de si, Naruto entende o que Gaara está sofrendo. Kankuro é infectado por um veneno. Sem um antídoto, ele terá poucos dias de vida. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Simulação - T01E38
programme.desc: 2007. Chega uma mensagem da Aldeia da Areia sobre o sequestro do Kazekage. Tsunade manda a equipe Kakashi para a aldeia. Kankuro começa a batalha contra os Akatsuki, mas as táticas dos bonecos não funcionam. Seu oponente foi quem desenvolveu essas táticas. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: A Ponte Tenchi - T01E39
programme.desc: 2007. Os ninjas tentam salvar Kankuro. Vovó Chiyo, perita em veneno, é chamada. Uma tempestade de areia atrasa Naruto, Sakura e Kakashi. Tsunade se preocupa e envia Guy e sua equipe. O akatsuki e Gaara começam o jutsu de selamento e os nove dragões fantasmas. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: A Nove Caudas Se Liberta - T01E40
programme.desc: 2007. Sakura trata Kankuro, deixando todos espantados com suas mãos firmes. Vovó Chiyo fica emocionada por Tsunade ter enviado sua própria aprendiz e pela determinação de Sakura. Kankuro fornece informações sobre os Akatsuki. Kakashi envia um cão de caça ninja. programme.sub-title: A Missão Super Secreta Se Inicia

Naruto e Sakura ficam chocados com a história das bestas de cauda. programme.desc: 2008. A equipe Kakashi encontra Itachi Uchiha, de quem sofrera uma amarga derrota no passado. Guy e sua equipe começam a lutar contra um amargo rival, Kisame, que lança um poderoso chakra para subjugar o ninja da folha. Seu jutsu aprisiona Neji, Lee e Tenten.
